title: Client
content:
# Client

Inherits from: SyncBaseClient


Kelvin API Client.

Parameters
----------
password : :obj:`str`, optional
    Password for obtaining access token
totp : :obj:`str`, optional
    Time-based one-time password
verbose : :obj:`bool`, optional
    Log requests/responses

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.client.method()
